response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and this resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015). Primary languages throughout the career are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no demonstrated large-scale distributed-systems or cloud-compute-platform infrastructure work at the scale this role demands. Formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers is also not evidenced.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career with staff/senior titles and mentoring/teaching track record
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby (millions of req/sec)
Founder of an open-source Kubernetes-deployable platform, showing architecture ownership
concerns: Falls drastically short of the 8-year C++ minimum requirement
No clear large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-infrastructure leadership experience
No evidence of formally leading cloud/DevOps engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform / distributed infra depth
Breadth of senior engineering and mentoring experience
